prose:
**Oxygen frontier-orbital result** — Property: HOMO–LUMO gap from a DFT frontier-orbitals calculation. Method used: tier `standard` with **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** as requested; program **PySCF**. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ geometry at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz` (2 atoms); this was a frontier-orbitals/single-point calculation, not a geometry optimization. Environment: **gas phase** (`solvent: null`). Charge **0**, multiplicity **3**. SCF converged: **true**, in **7** cycles. Chemkit integrity trustworthy verdict: **true**.

Headline result: **HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.2880586 eV**.

Returned orbital quantities: HOMO = **-8.8739616 eV**; LUMO = **-3.5859031 eV**. Total electronic energy = **-150.38872 Hartree** = **-4092.2855 eV**. Koopmans-style quantities returned by the tool: vertical IP = **8.8739616 eV**, vertical EA = **3.5859031 eV**, electronegativity = **6.2299323 eV**, chemical hardness = **2.6440293 eV**, chemical softness = **0.37821064 1/eV**, electrophilicity index = **7.3395664 eV**.

Warnings: no `warnings` entries were returned by the chemkit tool result.

Reproducibility: chemkit returned this CLI invocation: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 3 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp29lxr2dm/live.json`. The tool result did not expose a live `.out` log path in the returned JSON, so I cannot honestly name one here.
